textByHash.1b0ca7291f75639cdc4b6e27670bce6d0c79cfe0: Maybe we'll all get lucky and the scorpions will deal with him.
textByHash.52a6f007dbb9696fbe487429025e660a44dbf592: from 'perfect gold' - whatever that is - like 'normal' golds just not good enough for little lord fancy pants there! I told him to head to the desert
textByHash.744ba1e6b83599b2c7ab34513d5d0462778f6907: persuasion around here recently... Wearing a poncey yellow cape he was! Came in here all la-di-dah, high and mighty, asking for jewelry made
textByHash.9908f64c53f62fbf312f2c9744c8f85f11d696e0: Good day to you traveller. Would you be interested in buying some gems?
textByHash.b5aeb0b974ba93c3d7a9ddf710797b807bdbc3aa: Fitzharmon eh? Hmmm.... If I'm not mistaken that's the family name of a member of the Varrockian nobility. You know, I HAVE seen someone of that
textByHash.e6a3678adada08e8e427abd9ec95d775aee35bc3: 'Cos I know theres gold out there, in them there sand dunes... and if it's not up to his lordships high standards of 'gold perfection'...
